# viettelidc_vdbs_network_interface (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VDBS Network Interface by id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) DBS Network Interface ID.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID the network interface belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `db_subnet_group_name` (String) Name of the DBS subnet group this ENI belongs to.
- `ip_address` (String) Private IP address assigned to the network interface.
- `name` (String) Network interface name.
- `status` (String) Network interface status (e.g. ACTIVE, ATTACHED).
